headline: 'Big Short' Star Steve Eisman Warns Middle Class Is 'Starting To Crack', Tax Refunds 'Went Into The Gas Tank'
summary: Steve Eisman, investor who shorted subprime mortgages, says middle-class stress is evident. Prediction markets disagree.
